title: oenothera contorta var. pubens
intro: Oenothera contorta var. pubens, also known as Evening Primrose, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Onagraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), an essential fatty acid with anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Oenothera contorta var. pubens include its potential to alleviate symptoms of premenstrual syndrome (PMS), menopausal hot flashes, and eczema, as well as its role in supporting cardiovascular health. Oenothera contorta var. pubens can be prepared as a herbal supplement in oil or capsule form, or used to make a topical cream for skin conditions.
